firebase-common.author: Rodrigo Lazo
firebase-common.message:
Add reCAPTCHA site key support to FirebaseOptions (#8216)

Added the reCAPTCHA site key field to FirebaseOptions and its builder to
allow configuration of reCAPTCHA within Firebase projects. Additionally,
added a lint baseline file to the firebase-common module to manage
existing lint issues.

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: Rodrigo Lazo
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message:
[AI] Return `retrievalConfig` entry to the right changelog section (#8253)

It was moved to the `Unreleased` section in #8225 due to a
misunderstanding.

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: Rodrigo Lazo
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message:
[AI] Update App Check dependencies in firebase-ai (#8225)

Updated the firebase-ai module to start depending on firebase-appcheck.
Also, make the dependencies point to the local project for the next
release.

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: emilypgoogle
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message:
Add Gemini 3.5 flash models to testing (#8213)

Gemini 3.5 was recently released and passes existing testing, should be
tested for the future.

ai-logic/firebase-ai.author: emilypgoogle
ai-logic/firebase-ai.message:
Add missing construction to TemplateTool that is present in Tool (#8188)

`TemplateTool` is separate from `Tool` for some reason and was missing
various features that are supported on `Tool` and work correctly with
templates. This adds them to `TemplateTool` and adds testing to validate
the maps grounding behavior on Google AI. Vertex does not respond
correctly to our grounding query at the moment so has not been included.

appcheck/firebase-appcheck.author: Rodrigo Lazo
appcheck/firebase-appcheck.message:
[AppCheck] Rename reCAPTCHA App Check provider (#8224)

Renamed `firebase-appcheck-recaptchaenterprise` to
`firebase-appcheck-recaptcha` to standardize the naming
convention. Updated `NetworkClient` to reflect the new `RECAPTCHA` token
type and adjusted internal references accordingly.

appcheck/firebase-appcheck.author: Rodrigo Lazo
appcheck/firebase-appcheck.message:
[AppCheck] Add getLimitedUseToken support to AppCheckProvider (#8204)

Introduced the getLimitedUseToken() method to the AppCheckProvider
interface and implemented it across the debug, Play Integrity, and
reCAPTCHA Enterprise providers. The implementation ensures that token
exchange requests include a "limited_use" flag, allowing for the
generation of short-lived, single-use App Check tokens.

Verified manually using debug provider

appcheck/firebase-appcheck-recaptcha.author: Rodrigo Lazo
appcheck/firebase-appcheck-recaptcha.message:
[AppCheck] Revert changed key in ExchangeRecaptchaTokenRequest (#8230)

Renamed back the RECAPTCHA_TOKEN_KEY constant to
`recaptchaEnterpriseToken` in the `ExchangeRecaptchaTokenRequest`. The
backend expects the value as is.

Verified with manual testing
